acceptance.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.body: By accessing or using TikLivePro ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service.

description.title: 2. Description of Service
description.body: TikLivePro is a live streaming platform that enables users to broadcast simultaneously to multiple social media platforms including TikTok and Facebook, and to view aggregated real-time comments from all connected platforms in a single dashboard.

eligibility.title: 3. Eligibility
eligibility.body: You must be at least 18 years old to use the Service. By using TikLivePro, you represent that you meet this requirement. If you are under 18, you may only use the Service with the verifiable consent of a parent or legal guardian.

account.title: 4. Account Responsibilities
account.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to notify us immediately of any unauthorized access. TikLivePro is not liable for any loss resulting from unauthorized use of your account credentials.

acceptable.title: 5. Acceptable Use
acceptable.body: You agree not to use the Service to stream content that is illegal, harmful, threatening, abusive, defamatory, or otherwise objectionable. You must comply with the terms of service of all connected third-party platforms (TikTok, Facebook). Violation of these rules may result in immediate account suspension without refund.

thirdParty.title: 6. Third-Party Platforms
thirdParty.body: TikLivePro integrates with TikTok, Facebook, and other platforms. Your use of these integrations is subject to the respective platform's own terms of service and policies. TikLivePro is not responsible for any actions taken by third-party platforms, including account suspension, content removal, or API access revocation.

billing.title: 7. Subscriptions and Payments
billing.body: Certain features of TikLivePro require a paid subscription. Subscription fees are billed on a recurring basis as selected at checkout. All payments are final and non-refundable unless required by applicable law. You may cancel your subscription at any time; cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.

ip.title: 8. Intellectual Property
ip.body: All content, logos, and materials provided by TikLivePro are owned by or licensed to TikLivePro and may not be reproduced or distributed without written permission. You retain full ownership of all content you create and stream through the Service.

liability.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
liability.body: TikLivePro is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, TikLivePro shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from or related to your use of the Service.

termination.title: 10. Termination
termination.body: TikLivePro reserves the right to suspend or terminate your account at any time for violations of these Terms or for any other reason at our sole discretion. You may also terminate your account at any time by contacting our support team.

changes.title: 11. Changes to Terms
changes.body: We may update these Terms of Service from time to time. Continued use of the Service after any changes constitutes your acceptance of the updated Terms. We will notify you of material changes via the email address associated with your account.

contact.title: 12. Contact
contact.body: For questions or concerns regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us at: legal@tiklivepro.pro

intro.title: 1. Introduction
intro.body: TikLivePro ("we", "us", "our") is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and share information when you use our Service, in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and applicable privacy laws.

collect.title: 2. Data We Collect
collect.body: We collect: (a) account information you provide — name, email address, and password; (b) social platform access tokens when you connect TikTok or Facebook accounts, which are encrypted at rest using AES-256-GCM; (c) usage data including session duration, stream statistics, and feature interactions; (d) technical data such as IP address, browser type, and device information collected automatically.

use.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
use.body: We use your data to: provide and continuously improve the Service; authenticate your identity and secure your account; connect to third-party platforms on your behalf to enable streaming; process subscription payments; send transactional and service notifications; and comply with legal obligations.

sharing.title: 4. Third-Party Sharing
sharing.body: We share data with: payment processors (Stripe) solely for billing purposes; social platforms (TikTok, Facebook) as required to enable the streaming and comment features you have authorized; analytics providers under strict data processing agreements to help us improve the Service. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

retention.title: 5. Data Retention
retention.body: We retain your account data for as long as your account remains active. Social platform access tokens are deleted immediately upon disconnecting an account. Upon account deletion, all personal data is permanently erased within 30 days, except where retention is required by law.

rights.title: 6. Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.body: If you are located in the European Economic Area, you have the right to access, correct, delete, or port your personal data. You may also object to processing or request restriction of processing. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@tiklivepro.pro. We will respond within 30 days.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.body: We use essential cookies for authentication and session management, which are strictly necessary for the Service to function. We also use analytics cookies to understand how the Service is used and improve it. You may disable non-essential cookies at any time in your browser settings without affecting core functionality.

security.title: 8. Security
security.body: We implement industry-standard security measures including AES-256-GCM encryption for stored OAuth tokens, HTTPS/TLS for all data in transit, and regular security audits. While we take every precaution, no system is completely secure. Please protect your account credentials and notify us immediately of any suspected breach.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically to reflect changes in our practices or applicable law. We will notify you of significant changes via email or in-app notification at least 14 days before they take effect. Continued use of the Service after changes indicates your acceptance.

contact.title: 10. Contact & Data Requests
contact.body: For privacy inquiries, data access requests, or to exercise your rights, contact our Data Protection team at: privacy@tiklivepro.pro. We are committed to resolving your concerns promptly.

hero.headline:
Go Live on TikTok
& Facebook Simultaneously
hero.subtext: Stream to all your platforms at once. Manage comments in real time, track live stats, and grow your audience — all from one dashboard.

features.heading: Everything you need to go live

multiPlatform.title: Multi-Platform Broadcasting
multiPlatform.description: Stream simultaneously to TikTok, Facebook, and more. One dashboard, every platform, zero tab switching.

comments.title: Unified Comment Feed
comments.description: All platform comments in one real-time stream. Reply to your audience without ever leaving the view.

analytics.title: Live Analytics
analytics.description: Track viewers, bitrate, FPS, and engagement as they happen. Understand your performance at every moment.

latency.title: Ultra-Low Latency
latency.description: WebRTC-powered streaming delivers your content to viewers in under 500 milliseconds.

pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtext: Start for free. Upgrade when you're ready to grow.

footer.tagline: The simplest way to go live everywhere.
